summary.next_step: Prepare the CLIA/CAP validation packet template for accuracy, precision, LoD, reproducibility, reportable range, failure modes, and change control.

rows.permitted_report_language: This assay candidate is under validation and is not ready for clinical interpretation.
rows.prohibited_language: Clinically diagnostic HRD positive; PARP inhibitor eligible; treatment recommendation

rows.permitted_report_language: Reportable range is not established; unsupported feature classes must be no-called.
rows.prohibited_language: Genome-wide HRD score reported as validated; companion diagnostic equivalent

rows.permitted_report_language: Raw-data QC must pass before interpretation is attempted.
rows.prohibited_language: Proceed despite missing raw provenance or failed sample pairing

rows.permitted_report_language: Alignment and coverage QC must pass before downstream feature interpretation.
rows.prohibited_language: Interpret with failed BAM validation or reference-build mismatch

rows.permitted_report_language: Small-variant feature extraction is not clinically locked.
rows.prohibited_language: Validated pathogenic small-variant result from this candidate pipeline

rows.permitted_report_language: CNV/LOH and scarHRD must be no-called until allele-specific segments are validated.
rows.prohibited_language: scarHRD score or biallelic loss call from coverage bins alone

rows.permitted_report_language: SV signatures and CHORD/HRDetect SV features must be no-called until SV caller validation passes.
rows.prohibited_language: Validated SV signature or CHORD call from BAM evidence counters alone

rows.permitted_report_language: Signature interpretation must be no-called when mutation count or reconstruction QC is below locked thresholds.
rows.prohibited_language: Validated SBS3 or HRD signature call before threshold validation

rows.permitted_report_language: No call: required validated input or QC threshold is missing; no clinical conclusion should be drawn.
rows.prohibited_language: Negative for HRD because feature was not assessed

rows.permitted_report_language: Research candidate evidence only; clinical interpretation is not established.
rows.prohibited_language: HRD positive; HRD deficient; clinically actionable

rows.permitted_report_language: Treatment decisions require clinician-owned review and validated clinical assay context.
rows.prohibited_language: Eligible for PARP inhibitor; recommend platinum; companion diagnostic result

rows.permitted_report_language: Not signed off for clinical reporting.
